name: Lite ASO
description: Lite ASO — budget-friendly ASO platform with free tier for keyword tracking and MCP server connecting directly to Claude and other AI assistants for metadata suggestions and rank analysis.

when_to_use: Free keyword tracking with AI metadata suggestions via MCP server integration
ASO optimization via Claude or other AI tools using MCP protocol connection
Budget-friendly keyword rank monitoring for indie and small app teams
AI-assisted metadata suggestions without paying enterprise ASO tool pricing

pros: MCP server connects directly to Claude/AI agents
cons: Feature depth still shallow vs leaders
MCP workflow requires AI setup literacy
review.verdict: Intriguing AI-agent-native ASO tool on a budget; early-stage polish and data depth to watch.
review.best_for: AI-forward developers who want ASO queries inside Claude or agents
review.not_for: Traditional marketing teams preferring polished dashboards

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
